description: Each pool can define a closed internal model. This config is intentionally separate from graph edges.

us_equity.description: US equities are treated as a global risk-asset pool driven by USD liquidity, discount rates, earnings/flow, risk appetite, and sector diffusion.

sp500.description: S&P 500 ETF exposure is treated as a US large-cap index pond driven by dollar liquidity, rates, credit spreads, ETF flow, breadth, earnings revisions, valuation pressure, buybacks, mega-cap earnings, and Fed/AI news.

a_share.description: A-shares are treated as a domestic policy and credit-sensitive pool. Policy is not enough without turnover, ETF flow, and market confirmation.

btc.description: BTC is treated as a USD-liquidity and crypto-liquidity sensitive pool with ETF inflow and leverage/confirmation risk.

gold.description: Gold is treated as a real-rate, dollar, geopolitics, inflation, ETF flow, and central-bank-demand pool.

a_share_semiconductor.description: A-share semiconductor inherits the A-share parent pool and adds sector policy, ETF flow, relative strength, valuation, and confirmation.

a_share_brokerage.description: A-share Brokerage Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_bank_insurance.description: A-share Bank and Insurance Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_ai_computer.description: A-share AI and Computer Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_communication_electronics.description: A-share Communication and Electronics Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_new_energy_ev.description: A-share New Energy Vehicle Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_healthcare_pharma.description: A-share Healthcare and Pharma Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_consumer.description: A-share Consumer Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_defense_military.description: A-share Defense and Military Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_resources_materials.description: A-share Resources and Materials Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.

a_share_real_estate_infra.description: A-share Real Estate and Infrastructure Pool uses the standard A-share industry ETF component template.
